selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 19.1% and 20-day momentum is 34.0%.
Trend quality is supported by 80% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 22.2% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 3.2%, downside volatility near 1.6%, and a recent max drawdown of 3.3%.
Volume confirmation is 93.9% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 19.5% versus SPY over 5 days and 22.2% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.89, confidence 0.86, and 0.9 weighted articles across 4 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.89, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 4 articles across 4 sources, 0.9 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.98, average source quality 0.83, confidence 0.86.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Price action and news are pointing in the same direction, which raises trust in the setup.
Overall model score is 0.320 with high confidence.

news_evidence.title: Cisco Systems Inc. filed 8-K: 8-K
news_evidence.llm_reason: An official SEC 8-K filing for Cisco. 8-Ks can contain material disclosures (e.g., management changes, agreements, financial updates). Without the filing contents, treat as potentially material; it warrants immediate review and could move the stock if it contains substantive information.
